reference: Hello Doctor, I am twenty years old. I had an unplanned pregnancy. My partner and I decided to have an abortion. I was not sure whether I was pregnant or not because I did not take a pregnancy test. Without taking the pregnancy test, I took an abortion kit, which is similar to the Mifegest kit, in the third week. On the second day, I experienced heavy bleeding and I saw a piece of flesh. I wanted to confirm whether I was pregnant or not. It has been a week since taking the abortion pills, and I am still experiencing bleeding.
text: Hello doctor, I'm 20 years old. I had an unplanned pregnancy and a partner and I decided to have an abortion. I was not sure whether I was pregnant or not because I did not take a pregnancy test. Without taking a pregnancy test, we took an abortion pill which is similar to mifepristone, but 30 minutes after starting, I experienced heavy bleeding that lasted 12 hours. I want to confirm whether I was pregnant or not. Is it too late to take a pregnancy test?
